data.title: Telegram’s Wallet enables zero-fee USDT deposits; withdrawal fees remain the same
data.description:
Although USDT on-ramps are now free on Wallet, withdrawal fees can still be as high as 3.5 USDT.

data.title: Yuga Labs sells Meebits intellectual property, focuses on Bored Ape Yacht Club and Otherside

data.title: Elon Musk’s DOGE May Be the ‘Most Bullish Thing That Could Happen’ To US Economy, According To Investment Bank Morgan Stanley – Here’s Why
data.description:

data.title: Barclays Invests $131M in BlackRock Bitcoin ETF as Institutional Adoption Grows
data.description:
Barclays Bank has disclosed a $131 million investment in BlackRock’s Bitcoin ETF, joining major financial institutions in the growing crypto ETF market.
source: https://coinpaprika.com/news/barclays-invests-131m-in-blackrock-bitcoin-etf-as-institutional-adoption-grows

data.title: Abu Dhabi Reveals $436.9 Million Investment in BlackRock’s Bitcoin ETF
data.description:
The post Abu Dhabi Reveals $436.9 Million Investment in BlackRock’s Bitcoin ETF appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
In a recent update, Abu Dhabi on Friday, revealed a massive $436.9 million stake in BlackRock’s iShares Bitcoin ETF (IBIT) as of December 31, 2024. The investment was made through Mubadala Investments, one of the country’s sovereign wealth funds, according to a 13F filing...
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/abu-dhabi-reveals-436-9-million-investment-in-blackrocks-bitcoin-etf/
